summary: Complete E2E testing of systematic speed, consistency and performance improvements. All features verified working: (1) Queue drain before each test - no stale messages contaminate results, (2) Pre-serialized message bodies - orjson used for all SQS serialization, (3) Adaptive poll count - scales down near completion, (4) Early exit when all messages received - warmup 10/10 and steady 100/100 received, (5) Lambda client singleton - cached with TCP keepalive, (6) Frontend throttled live metrics updates - max every 150ms, (7) useMemo for distributionData and filteredHistory. SSE streaming completes without errors for both warmup and steady profiles.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after brief delay (known issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: SSE warmup test (10 msgs) completes without errors - no error event received
SSE steady test (100 msgs) completes without errors - all 100 messages received
Queue drain works correctly - no stale messages contaminate results (drain_count logged if stale found)
regression_alert appears in stats event with type (personal_best/regression/normal)
Early exit: all 10 warmup messages received (received == total in complete event)
Early exit: all 100 steady messages received (received == total in complete event)
Frontend Live Testing tab renders and shows test results after warmup
Frontend Optimization Journey card renders (data-testid='optimization-journey') showing -99% improvement
Frontend Regression Alert card renders (data-testid='regression-alert') with red styling for regression type
Frontend Latency Breakdown renders (data-testid='latency-stacked-bar') with 6 service segments
Frontend test history loads and is filterable by profile (All, warmup, steady, burst, soak)
Backend /api/test-history returns array with 50 entries, each with regression_alert field
No JavaScript console errors on Live Testing tab
All 13 pytest tests passed (SSE streaming, test history, heartbeat, PC status, warmup, Bulava endpoints)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All performance improvements verified: throttled metrics, useMemo, SSE streaming, UI components)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test runs created during testing - 50+ history entries in MongoDB with regression_alert field
context_for_next_testing_agent: Systematic performance improvements fully implemented and working. Key optimizations: (1) Queue drain at line ~691-715 in server.py - drains stale messages before test with 500ms deadline, (2) Pre-serialized bodies at line ~689 using orjson.dumps, (3) Adaptive poll count at line ~846 - scales down from 10 to min(2, remaining//5+1) near completion, (4) Early exit at line ~893-894 - breaks loop when received >= count, (5) Lambda client singleton at line ~1178-1193 with cached _lambda_client_cache, (6) Frontend throttled metrics at line ~438-441 in App.js - max update every 150ms using lastMetricsUpdate ref, (7) useMemo for distributionData at line ~525-532 and filteredHistory at line ~535-537. Latest warmup test: 165ms avg, 40.3/s throughput. Latest steady test: 1062ms avg, 46.3/s throughput.

queue_drain.details: Queue drain runs before each test with 500ms deadline, removes stale messages to ensure clean test results

pre_serialized_bodies.details: orjson.dumps used for all SQS message serialization - messages parse correctly on receive

adaptive_poll_count.details: Poll count scales from 10 down to min(2, remaining//5+1) as messages near completion

early_exit.details: Warmup: 10/10 received, Steady: 100/100 received - loop exits immediately when all messages received

lambda_client_singleton.details: Lambda client cached in _lambda_client_cache global variable for connection reuse

frontend_throttled_metrics.details: Live metrics updates throttled to max every 150ms using lastMetricsUpdate.current ref

usememo_optimizations.details: distributionData and filteredHistory wrapped in useMemo to prevent unnecessary recalculations

sse_no_errors.details: Both warmup and steady tests complete without error events in SSE stream

regression_alert_in_stats.details: Stats event contains regression_alert with type='regression', current_avg, best_avg, regression_pct

frontend_components.details: All UI components render: Optimization Journey, Regression Alert, Latency Breakdown, Bottleneck Analysis, Test History

test_history_filterable.details: Test history panel shows 50 runs, filterable by profile (All, warmup, steady, burst, soak)
